steps.title: Apply the date limit
steps.content: The sentence needs examples of hoards discovered before 2000. In the table, Dunmore was discovered in 1896 and Loughrea in 1940; Carrowkeel was discovered in 2001.

steps.title: Reject date errors
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly puts Loughrea in the 2000s and includes Carrowkeel after the cutoff. Choice B claims several 1800s discoveries without support. Choice C swaps the dates for Carrowkeel and Loughrea.

steps.title: Choose pre-2000 examples
steps.content: Listing Dunmore in 1896 and Loughrea in 1940 accurately gives two examples discovered before 2000. The answer is D.
